dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block D Carrier Capability and Restrictions
purpose: Mock/reference carrier capability matrix for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Carrier acceptance changes by station, route, product, contract, commodity, and current regulation. Replace or validate with carrier APIs/contracts/manuals before production use.
conservative_policy: Use yes only when public carrier sources clearly support capability. Use partial when capability is lane/station/product dependent. Use unknown rather than guessing.
recommended_next_research: Singapore Airlines Cargo direct product capability sheet
FedEx special cargo beyond DG/dry ice
DHL live animals, valuables, human remains
